warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills: 5-8min
1 round:
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
3 PVC Pass Throughs
3 PVC Around the Worlds each way
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 Broad Jumps
2 Rounds (PVC/Barbell):
3 Snatch Pull
3 Hang Power Snatch
3 Full Snatch
5 OH Squat
0530 specific warm up
10 Band Row, Rotate, Press
10 Scap Pull Ups
3 Snatch Pull
3 Hang Power Snatch
100m run
5 Kip Swings
5 Pull Ups
2 reps at weights warming up to metcon weight.

metcon.name: Part B
metcon.description:
6 min AMRAP
4 Wall Walks (partition as required)
20 Alternating Box Jumps (alternate with partner)

hypertrophy.reasoning: Wall walks and box jumps heavily tax lower body and anterior chain; accessory targets posterior chain and pulling patterns for balance.

raw_text:
Warm-up | Activation & Mobilisation Drills: 5-8min
1 round:
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
3 PVC Pass Throughs
3 PVC Around the Worlds each way
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 Broad Jumps
2 Rounds (PVC/Barbell):
3 Snatch Pull
3 Hang Power Snatch
3 Full Snatch
5 OH Squat
0530 specific warm up
10 Band Row, Rotate, Press
10 Scap Pull Ups
3 Snatch Pull
3 Hang Power Snatch
100m run
5 Kip Swings
5 Pull Ups
2 reps at weights warming up to metcon weight.
Part A | 400m Run
2 Rounds
20 Deadlifts @ 90/55
20 T2B
8 Synchro Burpee over bar
400m Run
2 Rounds
15 Cleans @ 70/45
20 T2B
8 Synchro Burpee over Bar
400m Run
2 Rounds
10 Thrusters @ 50/35
20 T2B
8 Synchro Burpee Over Bar
Rest 3 Mins
Scale T2B to kipping leg raise or reduce volume so burpees take less than 60 seconds
Part B | 6 min AMRAP
4 Wall Walks (partition as required)
20 Alternating Box Jumps (alternate with partner)
siri_text: Monday's workout. Metcon: Part B. AMRAP 6 minutes: 4 Wall Walks (partition as required), 20 Alternating Box Jumps (alternate with partner). For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, rear deltoids.
